# AI Workplace Productivity Assistant

> AI-powered tools to automate daily work tasks: email generation, meeting summarization, task planning, research, and conversational assistance.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Overview of all AI productivity tools
- [Email Generator](/email): Generate professional emails with tone and audience customization
- [Meeting Summarizer](/meetings): Extract key points, action items, and decisions from meeting notes
- [Task Planner](/tasks): Prioritize tasks and get smart scheduling suggestions
- [Research Assistant](/research): Get structured insights and summaries on any topic
- [AI Chatbot](/chat): Conversational assistant for productivity and workplace tasks

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
